_doc: Criterion 3 pre-registered queries. correct = any top-3 result whose CUT RANGE has IoU >= 0.5 with any gt_range OR start within +/-0.5s of it; for containment_ok anchors (deliberately broad ground truth like 'the speaker at the podium'), a cut range fully inside the gt range also counts. Ground truth labeled by DIRECT media inspection (frames viewed, validated transcript sentence bounds), never by querying the index. All occurrences of a phrase are labeled. Queries for credits/coast are finalized after media download, BEFORE any search against their index.

queries.gt_basis: transcript sentence bounds of all three utterances

queries.query: you can't connect the dots looking forward
queries.gt_basis: both sentences stating this idea (297.12 and 306.60)
sentence 'I was diagnosed with cancer.' at [614.20, 616.22]

queries.query: Stanford university logo with a tree
queries.gt_basis: frames viewed: black at f26649 (888.3s), logo at f26723 (890.8s) through end

queries.query: man in black academic robes speaking at a wooden podium
queries.gt_basis: frames viewed: podium shot spans effectively the whole speech; any shot inside counts

queries.query: TO FINALIZE after media inspection: waves crashing on rocks
TO FINALIZE after media inspection: aerial drone shot of the coastline
TO FINALIZE after media inspection (music-bed lyric or spoken line if any)
